## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and align on the Template Gallery UI design for Lovable's website, focusing on SEO optimization and integration with existing template initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/wDyj8rqsK9sDnH33vgcvzaer3FReB8VU?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX team is designing a template gallery and detail pages for SEO purposes](https://fathom.video/share/wDyj8rqsK9sDnH33vgcvzaer3FReB8VU?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Potential misalignment between GrowthX's SEO-focused approach and Lovable's existing template quality standards](https://fathom.video/share/wDyj8rqsK9sDnH33vgcvzaer3FReB8VU?tab=summary&timestamp=1685.0)
  - [Need to determine if two separate tracks (SEO-optimized vs. high-quality templates) should coexist or be merged](https://fathom.video/share/wDyj8rqsK9sDnH33vgcvzaer3FReB8VU?tab=summary&timestamp=1937.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting required with key stakeholders to align on strategy and prevent duplicate work](https://fathom.video/share/wDyj8rqsK9sDnH33vgcvzaer3FReB8VU?tab=summary&timestamp=2008.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Template Gallery Design

  - [Georgemaine presented designs for a template gallery and detail pages](https://fathom.video/share/wDyj8rqsK9sDnH33vgcvzaer3FReB8VU?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [Focus on SEO optimization and rankability](https://fathom.video/share/wDyj8rqsK9sDnH33vgcvzaer3FReB8VU?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Includes filters, sticky navigation, and detailed template information](https://fathom.video/share/wDyj8rqsK9sDnH33vgcvzaer3FReB8VU?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Designed with Lovable's gradient background style in mind](https://fathom.video/share/wDyj8rqsK9sDnH33vgcvzaer3FReB8VU?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)

### Lovable's Existing Template Initiatives

  - [Sebastian is leading efforts on high-quality templates for the builder ecosystem](https://fathom.video/share/wDyj8rqsK9sDnH33vgcvzaer3FReB8VU?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Current focus on user experience and potential marketplace development](https://fathom.video/share/wDyj8rqsK9sDnH33vgcvzaer3FReB8VU?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [Concerns about AI-generated templates meeting Lovable's quality standards](https://fathom.video/share/wDyj8rqsK9sDnH33vgcvzaer3FReB8VU?tab=summary&timestamp=1685.0)
  - [Existing template page structure differs from GrowthX's proposed design](https://fathom.video/share/wDyj8rqsK9sDnH33vgcvzaer3FReB8VU?tab=summary&timestamp=1685.0)

### Design and Brand Considerations

  - [Felix shared new brand direction, including updated background designs](https://fathom.video/share/wDyj8rqsK9sDnH33vgcvzaer3FReB8VU?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
  - [Suggestion to animate background gradients for a more dynamic feel](https://fathom.video/share/wDyj8rqsK9sDnH33vgcvzaer3FReB8VU?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
  - [Discussion on how to best incorporate templates into Lovable's homepage](https://fathom.video/share/wDyj8rqsK9sDnH33vgcvzaer3FReB8VU?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)

### Potential Conflicts and Alignment Needs

  - [Two separate approaches to templates: SEO-focused vs. high-quality curated](https://fathom.video/share/wDyj8rqsK9sDnH33vgcvzaer3FReB8VU?tab=summary&timestamp=1937.0)
  - [Concern about duplicate work and misaligned objectives](https://fathom.video/share/wDyj8rqsK9sDnH33vgcvzaer3FReB8VU?tab=summary&timestamp=1966.0)
  - [Need to determine if both approaches can coexist or should be merged](https://fathom.video/share/wDyj8rqsK9sDnH33vgcvzaer3FReB8VU?tab=summary&timestamp=1937.0)
  - [Importance of maintaining Lovable's quality standards while optimizing for SEO](https://fathom.video/share/wDyj8rqsK9sDnH33vgcvzaer3FReB8VU?tab=summary&timestamp=1685.0)

### Technical Collaboration

  - [GrowthX team includes a full-stack engineer and designer with coding capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/wDyj8rqsK9sDnH33vgcvzaer3FReB8VU?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [Potential for deeper integration and support for Lovable's existing initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/wDyj8rqsK9sDnH33vgcvzaer3FReB8VU?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule a follow-up meeting with Marcel, George, Sebastian, and potentially Ceci](https://fathom.video/share/wDyj8rqsK9sDnH33vgcvzaer3FReB8VU?tab=summary&timestamp=2008.0)
  - [Align on the strategy for template pages and gallery design](https://fathom.video/share/wDyj8rqsK9sDnH33vgcvzaer3FReB8VU?tab=summary&timestamp=2008.0)
  - [Determine if SEO-focused and high-quality template tracks should coexist or be merged](https://fathom.video/share/wDyj8rqsK9sDnH33vgcvzaer3FReB8VU?tab=summary&timestamp=1937.0)
  - [Clarify quality standards for templates and how to meet them while optimizing for SEO](https://fathom.video/share/wDyj8rqsK9sDnH33vgcvzaer3FReB8VU?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
  - [Explore ways to integrate GrowthX's work with Lovable's existing template initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/wDyj8rqsK9sDnH33vgcvzaer3FReB8VU?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
